name: skill-frontmatter
assertion: SKILL.md exists with name: webmail and clearly distinguishes itself from the email skill

name: env-checker-runs
assertion: node .agent/skills/webmail/scripts/check-webmail-env.mjs runs and never prints an actual secret value

name: two-stacks-documented
assertion: The skill documents both IMAP stacks (imap.mjs legacy vs webmail.mjs/webmail-ui.mjs current) and does not conflate them

name: no-untested-claim
assertion: The skill does not imply webmail.mjs, webmail-ui.mjs, or imap.mjs have test coverage — they don't
